chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1878 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.7451/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on CMA No.7452/2025 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of main case 17.11.2025 Mr. Mujeeb-ur-Rehman Laghari, Advocate for the Petitoners >>>>>..<<<<< 1. Urgency granted. 2. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 3. Heard learned counsel for the Petitioners and perused the material available on record. From the contents of the Petition, it appears that a civil dispute exists between the parties, and a Civil Suit in this regard is already pending before the competent court. In such circumstances, no ground is made-out for interference or indulgence by this Court in its constitutional jurisdiction. Accordingly, the instant Constitutional Petition, being misconceived, is hereby dismissed in limine. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
